<!--
TEMPLATE NOTES (delete before publishing):
- draft: true  → excluded from manifest, HTML, RSS, OG. Flip to false to publish.
- slug         → URL: /posts/<slug>. Keep kebab-case, unique.
- categories   → array. Existing: Development, .NET, Architecture, OrchardCore, Blazor, Anime, ...
- tags         → array. Free-form, but reuse existing where possible.
- featured     → true pins to featured list on home.
- cover        → omit to auto-generate an SVG OG card from the title.
- Reading time → computed from word count (~200 wpm). No field needed.
- After editing: rerun `dotnet run --project tools/Blog.ManifestGenerator -- src/Blog.Wasm/wwwroot`
-->
